data.content: Shipment verified complete on remote main. Merge commit bc1963b82eca brought origin/work/foolery-1f10-concurrent-fix onto origin/main. GitHub Actions CI run 23303799900 passed for that commit; Coverage Badge also succeeded. Tagged the merge commit for shipment traceability. Residual note: CI emitted warnings about deprecated Node.js 20 actions and a coverage regression annotation, but the workflow concluded successfully.
